leaderboard.noInfinity: No one has solved an infinity puzzle yet.

game.instructions: Place exactly one crown in each row, column, and colored region. Crowns can't touch, even diagonally.
game.recorded: Awesome! Your time is on the leaderboard.
game.autoFillDesc: Automatically places X marks around each crown you place.

cookies.title: Quick Cookie Question
cookies.description: Can we remember your language, theme, and game settings (like Auto-X)? It'll save you from setting it up every time.
cookies.essential: We'll only store the basics then.

admin.title: Admin Panel
admin.generateDesc: If there's no board yet, you can manually generate one here.

legal.addressTitle: Information according to § 5 Digital Services Act (DDG)
legal.dispute: Consumer dispute resolution / Universal arbitration board
legal.disputeText: We are not willing or obliged to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
legal.p1_text: The following notes provide a simple overview of what happens to your personal data when you visit this website. Personal data are all data with which you can be personally identified.
legal.p2_text: The data processing on this website is carried out by the website operator. The responsible body is:
legal.p3_reg_text1: When you create a user account on our website, the following data is stored:
legal.p3_reg_li4: Game-related data such as streaks or solved games
legal.p3_reg_text2: The processing of this data is carried out to provide the account functions of the website.
legal.p3_reg_basis: The legal basis for the processing is Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. b GDPR.
legal.p3_game_text: To provide the game functions, the following additional information is stored:
legal.p3_game_purpose: This data serves exclusively for the function of the game and the display of progress or leaderboards.
legal.p3_feedback_text: If you send feedback via the website, your message will be stored together with your user ID.
legal.p3_feedback_basis: The legal basis is Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. f GDPR (legitimate interest in improving our offer).
legal.p3_cookies_text: Our website exclusively uses technically necessary cookies. These are required for:
legal.p3_cookies_basis: The processing is carried out on the basis of Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. f GDPR.
legal.p3_hosting_text: This website is hosted by Vercel. The provider automatically collects information in so-called server log files:
legal.p3_hosting_li1: IP address, browser type/version, operating system
legal.p3_hosting_li2: Referrer URL, time of the server request
legal.p3_hosting_basis: The legal basis for the processing is Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. f GDPR.
legal.p3_analytics_text: We use Vercel Analytics to analyze the use of our website in order to improve the user experience.
legal.p3_analytics_basis: The processing is carried out on the basis of Art. 6 Para. 1 lit. f GDPR.
legal.p4_text: Account data is stored as long as a user account exists. If you request the deletion of your account, your data will be deleted, provided there are no legal retention obligations.
legal.p5_text: Within the framework of the applicable legal provisions, you have the right at any time to information, correction, deletion, restriction of processing and data portability as well as the right to revoke a granted consent at any time.
legal.p6_title: 6. Right of appeal to the supervisory authority
legal.p6_text: In the event of violations of data protection law, you have a right of appeal to a data protection supervisory authority (usually the authority of your state).
legal.p7_text: For security reasons and to protect the transmission of confidential content, this site uses SSL or TLS encryption.
